name: Wobbly Move
description: Drag transition that turns the window into a sheet of fabric held at the point you grab, so the rest drapes and trails behind, driven by a neighbour-coupled spring simulation. Every physics knob is exposed so the feel can be dialled from taut cloth to loose jelly.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.description: Overall amount of deflection, where higher values exaggerate the drape

parameters.name: Sheet stiffness
parameters.description: How rigidly the body holds its shape, where lower values drape more like loose cloth

parameters.name: Grip strength
parameters.description: How tightly the grabbed point tracks the cursor, where higher values keep it pinned under the pointer

parameters.name: Springiness
parameters.description: How much the sheet oscillates before settling, where lower values drift to rest and higher values bounce like jelly

parameters.name: Responsiveness
parameters.description: How quickly the sheet reacts to the drag, where lower values feel heavier

parameters.name: Maximum bend
parameters.description: Cap on how far any part of the window may deflect (px)
